data.grid_price_net: Grid price before tax in EUR/kWh
data.solar_price_net: Solar price before tax in EUR/kWh
data.max_interval_average_kw: Maximum plausible interval average in kW

data_description.base_url: Android API endpoint. Keep the default unless Astra changes servers.
data_description.poll_interval: How often Home Assistant polls Astra for current meter readings. The default is 3600 seconds / 1 hour.
data_description.backfill_days: How many days to fetch when running the backfill action.
data_description.recent_refresh_hours: How many recent hours to re-fetch when running the backfill action.
data_description.history_granularity: Use monthly meter stands for efficient imports or quarter-hour energy balance rows for detailed Energy Dashboard history.
data_description.import_statistics: When enabled for the backfill action, write fetched historical readings into recorder long-term statistics.
data_description.grid_price_net: Astra reports prices before German VAT. The price entity exposes the gross value.
data_description.solar_price_net: Astra reports prices before German VAT. The price entity exposes the gross value.
data_description.tax_rate: Tax rate as a decimal fraction, for example 0.19 for 19%.
data_description.max_interval_average_kw: Reject or smooth quarter-hour values above this average power. The default 50 kW is intentionally high for a residence.
data_description.smooth_interval_anomalies: Redistribute delayed provider spikes across preceding missing buckets instead of leaving them out as missing data.
data_description.anomaly_redistribution_window: Maximum number of preceding 15-minute buckets that one delayed spike may be spread over.
data_description.smoothing_lookaround_days: Use matching time-of-day values from nearby days to shape smoothing. Set to 0 to only use same-day channel shape.
data_description.cache_interval_payloads: Do not re-download older daily interval payloads after they were fetched once. Recent hours are still refreshed.
data_description.web_fallback_enabled: Check an already logged-in Astra browser session as a fallback/diagnostic channel.
data_description.web_base_url: Astra web portal graph directory. Keep the default unless Astra changes the portal path.
data_description.web_session_id: sessionId from a logged-in Astra web URL. Stored in the config entry and redacted from diagnostics.
data_description.web_cookie: Full Cookie header from the logged-in browser session. Stored in the config entry and redacted from diagnostics.
data_description.web_graph_total_id: Astra pm_graph.php ID used to validate total-energy graph access.
data_description.browser_proxy_enabled: Use the local persistent-browser sidecar when the mobile API returns deferred data.
data_description.browser_proxy_url: Base URL of the local Astra browser proxy sidecar.
data_description.browser_proxy_token: Optional bearer token required by the browser proxy. Stored in the config entry and redacted from diagnostics.

data.grid_price_net: Grid price before tax in EUR/kWh
data.solar_price_net: Solar price before tax in EUR/kWh
data.max_interval_average_kw: Maximum plausible interval average in kW

data.grid_price_net: Grid price before tax in EUR/kWh
data.solar_price_net: Solar price before tax in EUR/kWh
data.max_interval_average_kw: Maximum plausible interval average in kW

backfill_history.name: Backfill history
backfill_history.description: Fetch historical Astra meter readings and optionally import them into long-term statistics.

backfill_days.name: Backfill days
backfill_days.description: Number of days to fetch from Astra.

recent_refresh_hours.name: Recent refresh hours
recent_refresh_hours.description: Recent overlap to fetch again, useful when Astra adjusts late-arriving values.

history_granularity.name: History granularity
history_granularity.description: monthly imports meter stands; quarter_hour imports Astra energy balance rows at 15-minute resolution.

import_statistics.name: Import statistics
import_statistics.description: Write fetched historical readings to recorder long-term statistics.

max_interval_average_kw.name: Maximum plausible interval average in kW
max_interval_average_kw.description: Override the configured anomaly threshold for this backfill run.

smooth_interval_anomalies.name: Smooth delayed interval anomalies
smooth_interval_anomalies.description: Override whether this backfill redistributes delayed spikes or leaves affected hours as missing data.

anomaly_redistribution_window.name: Maximum smoothing window in 15-minute buckets
anomaly_redistribution_window.description: Override how far back one delayed spike may be spread for this backfill run.

smoothing_lookaround_days.name: Smoothing lookaround days
smoothing_lookaround_days.description: Override how many nearby days are used for time-of-day smoothing weights.

cache_interval_payloads.name: Cache old interval API payloads
cache_interval_payloads.description: Override whether older daily interval payloads are reused from the cache for this backfill run.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional loaded Astra Energy config entry ID. Leave empty to backfill all loaded Astra Energy entries.

run_in_background.name: Run in background
run_in_background.description: Start the backfill as a background task and return immediately. Useful for long quarter-hour imports behind reverse proxies.

api_auth_failed.title: Astra Energy authentication failed
api_auth_failed.description: Astra rejected the stored credentials. Reauthenticate the Astra Energy integration. Last error: {error}

api_deferred.title: Astra Energy data deferred
api_deferred.description: Astra returned an empty, malformed, or incomplete payload. Astra Energy withheld cumulative energy sensors to avoid invalid Home Assistant statistics. Last error: {error}

api_unavailable.title: Astra Energy update failed
api_unavailable.description: Astra Energy could not fetch meter data. Home Assistant will retry automatically. Last error: {error}

backfill_failed.title: Astra Energy backfill failed
backfill_failed.description: Astra Energy could not import historical statistics. Last error: {error}

web_session_failed.title: Astra Energy web session failed
web_session_failed.description: The optional browser-session fallback is configured but not usable. Update the web sessionId/Cookie in the integration options or disable the fallback. Last error: {error}
